lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'evolved', 'notes': 'Information Lifecycle Management (ILM) as a distinct term has evolved into data lifecycle management, tiered storage, and cloud data management frameworks.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'RFID remains active across retail, supply chain, healthcare, and logistics. Walmart itself mandated RFID use by suppliers.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Online auction and B2B reverse auction/procurement platforms remain active. eBay dominant in consumer space; Ariba, Coupa for B2B procurement.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Web analytics has evolved significantly (Google Analytics, Adobe Analytics, privacy-first tools). Real-time analytics now standard.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'evolved', 'notes': 'Decision Support Systems (DSS) evolved into Business Intelligence (BI) and advanced analytics. Absorbed into modern BI tools (Tableau, Power BI) and AI-driven analytics.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Enterprise WiFi is now foundational infrastructure. WiFi 6 and WiFi 6E are current standards. Market growing with IoT and mobile-first enterprise needs.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}
notes: Key productivity enabler for corridor-cruiser laptop users; blocked by security fears, support costs, and high initial cost.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'CRM is a core enterprise software category. Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, HubSpot dominate. Market growing with AI integration.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Retail automation (self-checkout, automated inventory) is active and expanding. AI-powered checkout and computer vision are current evolution.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'evolved', 'notes': 'Enterprise Web Services Management has evolved into API Management (Apigee, AWS API Gateway, MuleSoft). Concept fully absorbed into modern integration architectures.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'SOX/regulatory compliance technology (GRC software) is an active and growing market. SOX remains law for US public companies. Major spending on compliance tech continues.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Automated replenishment has evolved into AI-driven demand forecasting and supply chain management. Active in retail, manufacturing, and e-commerce.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Data center consolidation has evolved into cloud migration and hybrid IT strategies. Still an active practice, now often called cloud rationalization.', 'source': 'pre-verified'}
